name: reclaim-evicted-pods
problem: Pods evicted under ephemeral-storage pressure pile up as Failed and clutter the namespace.
author: ops

name: reload-proxy-config
problem: The proxy's config drifted from declared; a reload applies it without a full restart.
author: ops

name: reboot-hung-gateway
problem: The gateway hangs (stops routing, memory climbs). A reboot clears it; investigate after.
author: ops
